Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*********************************************************************************

 Every monad gives rise to an adjunction

 If a bicategory has Eilenberg-Moore objects, then every monad arises from an
 adjunction. This is the so-called free-algebra adjunction.

 This generalizes the construction in Monads.MonadAlgebras.v.
 Note: since we can instantiate this construction for Kleisli objects as well, the
 construction also generalizes the construction in Monads.KleisliCategory.v

 Contents
 1. Adjunction from monad
 2. The monad from the adjunction from a monad is equivalent to the original monad

 *********************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.EilenbergMooreObjects.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.MonadsLax.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Monads.Examples.AdjunctionToMonad.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.MonadInclusion.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section MonadToAdjunction.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (HB : bicat_has_em B)
          (m : mnd B).

  Let x : B := ob_of_mnd m.
  Let f : x --> x := endo_of_mnd m.
  Let η : id₁ _ ==> f := unit_of_mnd m.
  Let μ : f · f ==> f := mult_of_mnd m.

  Let e : em_cone m := pr1 (HB m).
  Let He : has_em_ump _ e := pr2 (HB m).

  Let l : e --> x := mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone _ e).
  Let lf : l · f ==> l := mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone _ e) • lunitor _.

  (**
   1. Adjunction from monad
   *)
  
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
m: mnd B
x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
em_cone m

HB: bicat_has_em B

f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
em_cone m

B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
m: mnd B
x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)

?f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ ?x · ?f
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
m: mnd B
x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
linvunitor ?f =
(rinvunitor ?f • (?f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • ?fm
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
m: mnd B
x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
((lassociator ?f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (?fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor ?f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • ?fm =
(?f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • ?fm

B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
m: mnd B
x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
 exact (μ • linvunitor _).
    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
m: mnd B
x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
• (μ • linvunitor f)
 abstract
        (refine (!(id2_left _) @ _) ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         refine (!_) ;
         exact (mnd_unit_right m)).
    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
m: mnd B
x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • ((μ • linvunitor f) ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • (μ • linvunitor f) =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • (μ • linvunitor f)
 abstract
        (rewrite !vassocr ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         use vcomp_move_R_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
         rewrite id2_right ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         exact (!(mnd_mult_assoc m))).
  Defined.

  Definition free_alg_1cell
    : x --> e
    := em_ump_1_mor _ He free_alg_1cell_cone.

  Definition mnd_to_unit
    : id₁ x ==> free_alg_1cell · l
    := η • cell_of_mnd_cell ((em_ump_1_inv2cell _ He free_alg_1cell_cone)^-1).

  Definition mnd_to_counit_cell_data
    : mnd_cell_data
        (# (mnd_incl B) (l · free_alg_1cell) · mor_of_em_cone m e)
        (# (mnd_incl B) (id₁ e) · mor_of_em_cone m e)
    := rassociator _ _ _
       • (_ ◃ cell_of_mnd_cell (em_ump_1_inv2cell _ He free_alg_1cell_cone))
       • mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e).

  
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
m: mnd B
x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
(((pr1
     (# (mnd_incl B)
        (em_ump_1_mor m He free_alg_1cell_cone))
   ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e))
  • lassociator
      (pr1
         (# (mnd_incl B)
            (em_ump_1_mor m He free_alg_1cell_cone)))
      (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B e))
      (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)))
 • (runitor
      (pr1
         (# (mnd_incl B)
            (em_ump_1_mor m He free_alg_1cell_cone)))
    ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)))
• cell_of_mnd_cell
    (em_ump_1_inv2cell m He free_alg_1cell_cone) =
(lassociator
   (pr1
      (# (mnd_incl B)
         (em_ump_1_mor m He free_alg_1cell_cone)))
   (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone m e)) (endo_of_mnd m)
 • (cell_of_mnd_cell
      (em_ump_1_inv2cell m He free_alg_1cell_cone)
    ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • μ

              (em_ump_1_mor m He free_alg_1cell_cone)))
        (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B e))
        (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e))

   • linvunitor

          (mor_of_em_cone m free_alg_1cell_cone)))

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
m: mnd B
x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f

    apply lunitor_triangle.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
m: mnd B
x:= ob_of_mnd m: B

lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
# (mnd_incl B) (l · free_alg_1cell)
· mor_of_em_cone m e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) (id₁ e) · mor_of_em_cone m e

  Definition mnd_to_counit
    : l · free_alg_1cell ==> id₁ e

    : left_adjoint_data free_alg_1cell
    := l ,, (mnd_to_unit ,, mnd_to_counit).

f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l

id₂ (free_alg_1cell · pr1 (mor_of_em_cone m e))

x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
?b = id₂ (free_alg_1cell · pr1 (mor_of_em_cone m e))

l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
free_alg_1cell ◃ id₂ (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone m e)) =
id₂ (free_alg_1cell · pr1 (mor_of_em_cone m e))

        apply lwhisker_id2.

lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l

▹ mor_of_em_cone m e =
id₂
  (# (mnd_incl B) free_alg_1cell · mor_of_em_cone m e)

(((rinvunitor
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        mnd_to_left_adjoint_data)
   • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        mnd_to_left_adjoint_data

  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint mnd_to_left_adjoint_data)

x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
((mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)
  ◃ cell_of_mnd_cell
      (em_ump_1_inv2cell m He free_alg_1cell_cone))
 • mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)) • lunitor l =
?t2

        apply idpath.

  Qed.

  Definition mnd_to_left_adjoint
    : left_adjoint free_alg_1cell
    := mnd_to_left_adjoint_data ,, mnd_to_left_adjoint_axioms.

  Definition mnd_to_adjunction
    : adjunction x e
    := free_alg_1cell ,, mnd_to_left_adjoint.

  (**
   2. The monad from the adjunction from a monad is equivalent to the original monad
   *)
  
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
m: mnd B
x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
mnd_mor_data (mnd_from_adjunction mnd_to_adjunction) m

mnd_mor_data (mnd_from_adjunction mnd_to_adjunction) m

B: bicat

B ⟦ ob_of_mnd (mnd_from_adjunction mnd_to_adjunction),

 exact (id₁ _).
    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
m: mnd B
x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f

• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
id₁
  (ob_of_mnd (mnd_from_adjunction mnd_to_adjunction))
· endo_of_mnd m ==>
endo_of_mnd (mnd_from_adjunction mnd_to_adjunction)
· id₁
    (ob_of_mnd (mnd_from_adjunction mnd_to_adjunction))
 exact (lunitor _
             • cell_of_mnd_cell ((em_ump_1_inv2cell m He free_alg_1cell_cone)^-1)
             • rinvunitor _).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
m: mnd B
x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
linvunitor (id₁ x) • (mnd_to_unit ▹ id₁ x) =
(rinvunitor (id₁ x) • (id₁ x ◃ unit_of_mnd m))

                               ◃ lunitor l) ▹ id₁ x)))))))))) =
?b

x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
f:= endo_of_mnd m: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η:= unit_of_mnd m: id₁ x ==> f
μ:= mult_of_mnd m: f · f ==> f
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
l:= mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e): B ⟦ e, x ⟧
lf:= mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)
• lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)): l · f ==> l
rinvunitor (free_alg_1cell · l · (free_alg_1cell · l))
• ((rassociator free_alg_1cell l (free_alg_1cell · l)
    • ((free_alg_1cell
        ◃ lassociator l free_alg_1cell l)
       • ((free_alg_1cell ◃ (mnd_to_counit ▹ l))
          • (free_alg_1cell ◃ lunitor l)))) ▹ id₁ x) =
?t2

B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
m: mnd B
x:= ob_of_mnd m: B
